element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Basic movement and bomb placement in enclosed arena
Strategic destruction to access power-ups and create escape routes
Navigation topology and bomb blast containment
Avoidance and elimination through bomb placement timing
Revealed after all enemies eliminated; goal object

typical_tension_triggers: Blast radius calculations under time pressure
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Wave-based tension: players navigate to destroy walls and eliminate enemies, then relief upon stage completion. Repeating cycle across 50 stages with gradual difficulty escalation.

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Destroyable walls conceal power-up items; players must choose which walls to break for strategic advantage
spatial_grammar.secret_convention: Bonus items accessible through obscure stage-specific conditions (e.g., Goddess Mask requires circling outer ring after all enemies killed; Cola Bottle requires standing on exit for ~15 seconds; Nakamoto-san requires destroying no walls)

difficulty_curve.early_game: Stages 1-16: Introduction to bomb placement, enemy avoidance, and power-up collection in relatively open arenas with predictable enemy patterns
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Stages 17-34: Tighter maze layouts, faster enemy behavior, more complex wall configurations requiring strategic destruction sequencing
difficulty_curve.late_game: Stages 35-50: Densely packed mazes, aggressive enemy AI, limited safe spaces, high risk from power-up placement locations
notable_spikes: Stage 2 (Nakamoto-san bonus condition: destroy zero walls)
Stages in 30+ range (increased enemy speed and maze complexity)

notable_level_patterns.description: Stages 6, 8, 14, 16, 22, 24, 30, 32, 38, 40, 46, 48 feature 10,000 point bonus requiring revealing exit and walking over it before killing any enemies
Stages 1, 7, 9, 15, 17, 23, 25, 31, 33, 39, 41, 47, 49 feature 20,000 point bonus requiring circling outer ring after all enemies eliminated
Stages 4, 12, 20, 28, 36, 44 feature 30,000 point bonus requiring exit reveal, walking over it, and continuous D-Pad holding for ~15 seconds before killing enemies
Stages 3, 11, 19, 27, 35, 43 feature 500,000 point bonus requiring killing all enemies and creating 248 chain reactions (incompatible with Detonator power-up)
Stages 2, 10, 18, 26, 34, 42, 50 feature 10,000,000 point bonus requiring killing all enemies without destroying any walls—highest score reward
Stages 5, 13, 21, 29, 37, 45 feature 20,000,000 point bonus requiring destroying every wall and bombing exit three times without killing any enemies
Remaining stages follow standard elimination objective: destroy destructible walls, eliminate all enemies, reach and enter exit door
